function[T0] { forall(x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T0) { not lib(functions).is_bijection[T0](x0) or x0 != x1 or lib(functions).is_bijection[T0](x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { (lib(functions).is_left_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) and lib(functions).is_right_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = lib(functions).is_two_sided_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { not (lib(functions).is_left_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) and lib(functions).is_right_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1)) or lib(functions).is_two_sided_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { not lib(functions).is_two_sided_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) or (lib(functions).is_left_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) and lib(functions).is_right_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1)) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T2, x4: T1) { not lib(functions).is_right_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0) != lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x3, x0) or x2(x4) = x3(x4) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T2, x4: T1) { not lib(functions).is_right_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) or exists(k0: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0, k0) != lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x3, x0, k0) } or x2(x4) = x3(x4) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T2 -> T0) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T2, T1](lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1)) = lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T2, T0](x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T2 -> T0) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or not lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T2, T0](x1) or lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T2, T1](lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x1)) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0) { x0 != x1 or x2 != x3 or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0) { x0 != x1 or exists(k0: T2) { x2(k0) != x3(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or exists(k1: T2) { x2(k1) != x3(k1) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T2) { x0 != x1 or exists(k0: T1) { x2(k0) != x3(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x3, x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1 -> T2) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or exists(k1: T1) { x2(k1) != x3(k1) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x3, x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T2 -> T0) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1, x2) } }
function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T2) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T2](lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x1, x0)) = lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T1, T2](x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T2) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T1, T2](x1) or lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T2](lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x1, x0)) } }
function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid] { forall(x0: lib(monoid).MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: lib(monoid).MonoidHom[T0, T1]) { lib(monoid).monoid_hom_ext[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0.ext(x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T2 -> T0, x3: T2 -> T0, x4: T2) { not lib(functions).is_left_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x2) != lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0, x3) or x2(x4) = x3(x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { (lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) and lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) = lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not (lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) and lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) or lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } or lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } = lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } = true } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or forall(x2: T0) { x1 = x2 or x0(x1) != x0(x2) } = true } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T1) { not (x0 != x1 and x2(x0) = x2(x1)) or not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x2) } }

function[T0: LeftCancelMonoidWithZero] { forall(x0: T0) { not idempotent_elem_iff_eq_zero_or_one[T0](x0) or (T0.0 = x0 or T0.1 = x0) = is_idempotent_elem[T0](x0) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0) { not exists(k0: T0 -> T1) { lib(functions).is_right_inverse_fn[T1, T0](x0, k0) } or lib(functions).has_right_inverse_fn[T1, T0](x0) } }
